M32 (Task Planner — write-side) COMPLETE (2026-04-16T07:20Z). All 11 tasks shipped. 1033/1033 unit tests, 9/9 Playwright cases across 8 spec files green, 0 lint errors / 24 warnings, typecheck clean across all 6 packages.

M32 ABI rebuild dance is now documented as verified T10 procedure: Node ABI via `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` + same for keytar (pnpm rebuild is a no-op because pnpm's content-addressed store already has the hashed artifact). Electron ABI via `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar`. Pattern: Node rebuild → vitest → Electron rebuild → Playwright.

Patterns proven across M30/M31/M32 and active for M33: three-tier canned test seam (classifier + provider + tools), {rows, truncated} envelope for agentic tools, data-step-kind as stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController-driven stop with canceled-status coercion, per-task atomic commits + Loki ledger commits (chore(loki): M<N> T<N> — commit ledger (<sha>)), ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, is_system column + filter-sweep pattern (extended in M33 T2 with isSystemRoleId predicate).
